title: funcy's night animation
description: A dynamic plugin that transforms your night sky with thrilling animations from night to day!
body:
![LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/pyIn9s2.gif)

A spigot plugin that adds a smooth transition from night to day! 

## Features:
- Set a percent (%) of players to be in bed to run the animation
- Disable animation in certain worlds
- Change the animation speed!

## Config


<details>
<summary>Config</summary>


```
worlds:
  world:
    enabled: true
    sleepPercentage: 51.0
```
</details>

## Plugin Setup:

You will require to have a premission called ```funcysnightanimation.use``` to use the commands.
Type ```/funcysnightanimation addworld <world_name> <player_sleeping_percentage>```; Below there is a more detailed explantion of the command completions.

As soon, you're loaded in

## Commands & Premissions: 

```addworld``` - Adds a world for the animation to play in
```reload``` - Reloads the config
```removeWorld``` - disables the animation to play in that world
```setPercent``` - Sets a certain sleeping percent for that world for the animation to play in
```worldList``` - Shows all enabled worlds with the percent!

You will require to have a premission called ```funcysnightanimation.use``` to use the commands
